findings.text: OCR extraction of NAP-SRC-0006 has low confidence (0.65) and produces garbled text; no reliable content can be discerned.
The source image may be of poor quality or the OCR engine may be inadequate; the extracted text is unintelligible.

proposed_artifacts.content: Manual review of NAP-SRC-0006 completed. The OCR-extracted text is garbled and unintelligible. No reliable facts, dates, parties, or legal content can be identified. Recommend obtaining a clearer copy of the source image or using an alternative OCR tool (e.g., Google Cloud Vision, Azure OCR) to improve extraction quality. If the original image is of poor quality, consider requesting a re-scan or alternative version from the client or opposing party.
proposed_artifacts.title: Manual Review Note for NAP-SRC-0006

summary: Manual review of source NAP-SRC-0006 (IMG_0303.jpeg). OCR extraction confidence is low (0.65) and the extracted text is largely garbled, making it impossible to identify the sender, recipient, date, or substantive content. No reliable factual or legal findings can be drawn. A follow-up task is proposed to obtain a clearer copy or alternative extraction.
